images.title: Roquette de mer.jpg
images.description: Cakile maritima at the foot of the dune in the south of Capbreton, Landes, France

images.title: Roquettes de mer.jpg
images.description: Cakile maritima on the slope of the dune in the south of Capbreton, Landes, France

images.title: Coastal dune of Capbreton eroded because naked.jpg
images.description: Coastal dune of Capbreton (Landes, France) eroded because naked.

images.title: Capbreton Blockhauss vus du Sud.jpg
images.description: Blockhauss of Capbreton (Landes, France) seen from the south. Built at the top of the dunes circa 1943, they show are now underwater 2/3 of the time. It shows 200 meters of recession of the beach in 65 years.

images.title: Blockhauss Capbreton a mi-pente 2.jpg
images.description: Le blockhaus n°6 de Capbreton (Landes) à mi-pente. Il n'a pas glissé sur la dune, c'est la dune qui a reculé. Aujourd'hui il est horizontal entouré par la mer la moitié du temps.
